authLoginDescription: Use your Google account to enter the admin console
forbiddenDescription: This account does not have the admin role and cannot access console configuration.
promptDescription: Configure the assistant and dialog defaults.
promptSystemPromptDescription: Controls the assistant's global behavior and cannot be empty.
promptSystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt, for example: You are an accurate and concise assistant.
promptDialogSystemPromptDescription: Controls the system constraints for each dialog session.
promptDialogSystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the dialog system prompt, for example: Prioritize the current context.
promptDialogOpeningMessageDescription: Supports Markdown and appears when the dialog first opens.
promptDialogOpeningMessagePlaceholder: Enter the default opening message. Markdown is supported.
